world_summary_note: World summary was NOT offered spontaneously — only written as part of the eval capture. Baseline model skipped the world summary step entirely.
convention_warning: Truth canonical names do not follow 'Truth N — Category' format. Custom thematic names used throughout. Would not align with established lore graph conventions.
key_observation: Without the skill, the open-question format was correctly adopted when the player explicitly requested it — but this was player-driven, not GM-initiated. The GM did not proactively offer a summary after all 11 truths.
